---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for GetFiles
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem statement

Describe the problem you're trying to solve. What's the use case? What's missing or painful today?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen. If you have an idea of the CLI surface
(new option, output format, etc.), include a short example.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request here.
